title: carthamus nitidus
intro: Carthamus nitidus, also known as the safflower or false safflower, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant's seeds are a rich source of carthamine, a pigment with various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carthamus nitidus include its ability to reduce pain, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Carthamus nitidus can be prepared as an herbal infusion, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
